HOTKEYVIS.NoneVisible: No keybindings are currently set to visible. Enable some in the Keybind Visibility menu.
HOTKEYVIS.KeyboardLegend: Highlighted keys have a binding — hover for details.
HOTKEYVIS.ToggleNotice: Toggle which keybindings appear in the visualizer. A GM can lock individual entries with Nik's Settings Locks to hide them from players.
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ExposeIndividual.Name: Show per-keybind toggles in Configure Settings
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ExposeIndividual.Hint: When enabled, every keybind visibility toggle also appears individually in the core Configure Settings window (in addition to the Keybind Visibility menu). Useful if your settings-lock module only surfaces settings shown there. Requires a reload.
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.OffsetX.Name: Button horizontal offset (px)
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.OffsetX.Hint: Horizontal pixel offset of the floating button from its anchor just right of the players list. Positive moves it right.
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.OffsetY.Name: Button vertical offset (px)
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.OffsetY.Hint: Vertical pixel offset of the floating button from its anchor. Positive moves it up.
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ToggleMenu.Name: Keybind Visibility
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ToggleMenu.Label: Configure Keybind Visibility
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ToggleMenu.Hint: Choose which keybindings appear in the Hotkey Visualizer window.
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ShowKeybind.Name: Show keybind: {name}
HOTKEYVIS.Settings.ShowKeybind.Hint: Whether this keybinding appears in the Hotkey Visualizer window.
